description_long: This sconce features a tall, rectangular backplate with a bold black-and-white striped pattern running vertically along its narrow edge. The front face is solid black, adorned with a circular white accent and a set of parallel white lines, suggesting a modern, geometric motif. Extending from the backplate is a gently curved arm that supports a small, cylindrical light fixture, which is also finished in a matching monochrome palette. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with a glossy, hard surface that reflects light. The design is sleek and minimalist, with clean lines and a strong visual contrast, making it suitable for contemporary urban environments. The fixture is intended to be wall-mounted and likely uses an LED light source for efficient illumination.
description: A tall, black-and-white striped wall sconce with a curved arm and a small cylindrical light fixture, featuring a modern geometric design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin, striped profile of the backplate and the curved arm extending outward.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the solid black face with a white circle and parallel lines, highlighting the geometric motif.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the striped edge and the outward curve of the arm.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain, solid black backplate with no visible decorative elements.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a modern, minimalist design with bold geometric patterns and a monochrome color scheme. Its clean lines and lack of ornamentation emphasize a contemporary aesthetic.
